summary: The Optimism payload validator divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change in block-hash validation error propagation; no validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 219: M	crates/optimism/payload/src/validator.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Err(PayloadError::BlockHash { ... })?` to `return Err(PayloadError::BlockHash { ... })?;`.
No block hash comparison, payload error shape, or Shanghai field validation behavior changed.
